name: A Dog and a Plane
original_name: หมาเห่าเครื่องบิน
overview: After flight attendant Khanit clashes with three EMTs and his bag is accidentally exchanged with EMT Toto's, the chaotic trio recklessly use his expensive belongings to finance a night out. When the truth comes out and Toto can't afford to pay Khanit back, he agrees to a trade of labour. Khanit tasks Toto with uncovering his boyfriend's cheating. When he does, however, Toto is bribed by Khanit's pilot boyfriend to keep it quiet. As the two spend more time together and their closeness grows, Toto may begin to regret his lie.

trailers.title: หมาเห่าเครื่องบิน (A Dog and A Plane) | GMMTV 2025
